content.description:
# Hob View Conversion Tracker

Tracking progress of converting JS views to Hob on the `hob-views` branch.

## Converted (12/41)

- sortable-list-view
- note-widget-view
- widget-markdown-view
- event-definition-view
- item-search-view
- error-view
- inline-card-view
- compact-card-view
- related-items-view
- element-inspector-view
- tag-browser-view
- error-list-view

## Unconverted — Large (100+ lines)

| View | Lines | Notes |
|------|------:|-------|
| type-workshop-view | 750 | Complex form builder |
| spatial-canvas-view | 617 | Core layout engine |
| system-browser-view | 575 | IDE-like browser |
| viewport-view | 384 | Root viewport |
| app-page-view | 374 | Page layout |
| symbol-browser-view | 344 | Symbol navigation |
| test-suite-view | 295 | Test runner |
| hobson-instance-view | 147 | Instance display |

## Unconverted — Medium (50–99 lines)

- script-view
- widget-checkbox-group-view
- modal-frame-view
- widget-button-view
- widget-radio-group-view
- widget-slider-view
- kernel:default-view

## Unconverted — Small (2–10 lines)

~12 trivial wrapper views.

## Strategy

Small wrappers are quick wins. Medium widget views are straightforward. Large views (spatial-canvas, viewport, type-workshop) are architecturally complex and may need new view ops.
